chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 96 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution of Reference as notices not issued cost not paid. ----------- 04.02.2025. Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, Advocate for Applicant. ************ Matter is pending for non-prosecution since 2022 as no compliance has been made; therefore, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
